fresh_user_hero_path: tests/onboard.spec.ts verifies a fresh guest can open /app, use the built-in test wallet, run the refusal path, and reach the first saved receipt without signup.
public_access: The live Worker at https://refusalrail.veithly.workers.dev supports guest proof mode; no builder-local state, extension install, or private key is required for the hero path.
reset_or_seed_strategy: Guest sessions are cookie-scoped, receipts are owner/session tagged, and public demo constants are testnet-only. Seed examples are UI hints, while reviewer-created receipts are persisted records.
abuse_limits: The public path is limited to Arbitrum Sepolia/test wallet demo actions, no real brokerage or securities execution, no private key in browser, and invalid tx hashes are rejected before storage.
second_context_or_role_proof: tests/hero.spec.ts verifies /app/receipts?role=auditor and receipt detail reopening after a created receipt.
support_contact_or_failure_state: Receipt not-found, invalid tx hash, and missing chain-action cases show retry/back-to-history paths rather than fake success.
